content.en:
"The Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor actually lost!"

"How can this be, the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor has already condensed the Yingang Holy Body, how can he still sleep?"

"This half-step domain ancestor called Wanfa Dao Ancestor didn't cast any holy body, and his methods looked relatively ordinary, why did he easily defeat the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor?"

"It's not that the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor is weak, it's that this name is called Wanfa Dao Ancestor is too strong, his foundation is too strong, even if there are no other means, he can crush the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor with his true own strength alone. It would be even more terrifying if he hid other means!"

"You see, the Battle Realm Tower actually ranked Ye Qingtian's combat power as the 582nd on the list of all things, and the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor also re-entered the list of all things, ranking 624th, it seems that the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor showed the holy body, and his evaluation improved, so he entered the list of all things again. "

"Although the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor rushed into the list of all things, he probably wasn't excited, but he was very disappointed!"

These people were right, the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor was not excited at all.

What's there to be excited about being listed at No. 624 on the list of all things?

If he hadn't been defeated, he would have been able to break into the top 600.

It's a pity that he lost!

Condensed the Yingang Holy Body, he was still defeated by Ye Tian's means, and the strength of the other party far surpassed him.

He could even feel that Ye Tian had not yet exerted his full strength, and there seemed to be another terrifying power hidden in the other party's body, which was the scene he saw when his pair of silver eyes used the Soul Forbidden Dao Technique.

Before, he thought it was an illusion and didn't want to believe it, but now that he thinks about it, it is not an illusion, but a real feeling.

Ye Tian is far stronger than him, no matter how unwilling he is, he can only admit it! .

----------------

"Win!"

Ye Tian was still a little happy in his heart.

Although the opponent's strength was not as strong as he imagined, but after winning the opponent, his reputation spread, I am afraid that at this moment, many half-step domain ancestors in the depths of the dark forbidden domain know about his existence, and even many domain ancestors have heard of it.

Such a reputation is enough to brag about.

Moreover, he also won 3,000 points from the Silver Eye Dao Ancestor.

That's right, he gambled 3,000 points, and seemed to want to win Guang Yetian at once, but he didn't expect to lose all at once.

Maybe with the identity of the other party, he doesn't necessarily care about the 3,000 points, but for Ye Tian, these 3,000 points are not a small few, enough to exchange for countless resources.

Even with the ancestral inheritance, 3,000 points can be exchanged for one door.

But Ye Tian knew very well that just defeating a silver-eyed Dao Ancestor was nothing at all.

The silver-eyed Dao Ancestor seemed to have a great reputation, but that was only for these half-step domain ancestors.

The Dark Sanctuary has been updated too quickly for generations of half-step domain ancestors on the list of all things, so a half-step domain ancestor on the list of all things is nothing, only the top ten can be regarded as real top geniuses, and others can only be regarded as ordinary geniuses, and the half-step domain ancestors who are not on the list of all things are not even considered geniuses.

"Other geniuses on the list of all things may not be found, so let's challenge it at the next level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The rules of the War Tower are very peculiar, you can skip the challenge, but you must not downgrade the challenge,

Ye Tian's consciousness communicated with the Black Tower Imprint, looking for the challenge information of the Unified Realm level.

Soon, he chose a Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor who had lost more than ninety percent of his ranks—the Black Fang Dao Ancestor!

Immediately, he chose to challenge the Black Fang Daozu.

Battle Realm Tower, an independent space, the Black Fang Dao Ancestor was cultivating, and he suddenly felt that someone had accepted the challenge message.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, this person dares to challenge me and look for death!"

The Black Fang Dao Ancestor was furious.

He had been in retreat, so he didn't know the Ten Thousand Dharma Dao Ancestors, and he hadn't heard of them.

However, he still agreed, ready to teach Ye Tian a lesson.

Wow!

The Black Fang Daozu left the independent space and came to the side of the fighting platform.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, come up!"

The Black Fang Dao Ancestor went to the fighting platform.

And Ye Tian also got a reminder from the War Boundary Tower, and he had to go up, otherwise after a certain period of time, the War Boundary Tower would forcibly move Ye Tian in.

Wow!

Ye Tian also entered the fighting platform where the Black Fang Dao Ancestor was located, and the two sides confronted each other.

"It's you who challenge me, it looks very strange, which force? So arrogant, dare to fight beyond the level!"

The Black Fang Dao Ancestor roared angrily.

"It's just a small half-step domain ancestor from the Daoshan realm!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ants from the realm, if you want to send points, I naturally have no reason not to accept them!"

The Black Fang Dao Ancestor smiled cruelly.

He had a lot of defeats in the Returning Realm, and although he had issued a challenge, if the powerful Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor accepted the challenge, he would definitely not agree.

But Ye Tian is such an ant, he will definitely agree.

"Noise!"

Ye Tian was too lazy to talk nonsense with the Black Tooth Dao Ancestor, a Dao Ancestor like the Black Tooth Dao Ancestor was definitely not as good as the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor, and the reason why he challenged the weak one was just to win some points.

Swish!

Ye Tian made a move, and a blow of the Shadow Thorn directly pierced through the Black Fang Dao Ancestor.

After that, he cast the Dark Pole Dao Spear several times in a row, directly bursting the body of the Black Fang Dao Ancestor and winning the battle.

When the body of the Black Fang Dao Ancestor was condensed outside the fighting platform, he was still in a state of confusion.

He hasn't reacted yet, why did he lose?

Soon, he learned about Ye Tian's strength.

", it turned out to be a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, I would have known it, I wouldn't have agreed!"

The Black Fang Dao Ancestor miscalculated.

This time I lost 1,000 points, and I don't know how long it will take to earn it back.

It's a loss!

The next time you accept someone else's challenge, you must inquire clearly, even if the other party is only a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, you have to be careful.

Next, Ye Tian continued to challenge a half-step domain ancestor who was named in the One Realm, and won the victory every time.

And the opponent he challenged became stronger and stronger, but no matter how strong the opponent was, he was defeated in his hands.

In this way, as his record got better and better, his ranking on the list of all things became higher and higher.

At this moment, a relatively powerful Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor couldn't stand it anymore and came directly in front of Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I am the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor Longyan Dao Ancestor, I want to challenge you, are you willing, if you win me, 5000 points will be given to you, if you lose, you only need to pay 500 points!"

Longyan Dao Ancestor spoke.

Ye Tian probed the situation of the Longyan Dao Ancestor, and then used the Black Tower Mark to check the record of the Longyan Dao Ancestor and estimate the strength of the other party.

In the end, Ye Tian nodded: "Okay, I agree!"
